actions.label: Subscribe to podcast
actions.description: Follow the feed to receive new episodes automatically.

actions.label: Listen to latest episode
actions.description: Open the most recent episode in the default podcast player.

actions.label: Open original episode page
actions.description: View the full episode page including notes, links, and transcript.

actions.label: Compare episodes by topic
